winning_payline_count: Here, a payline is any full row or either long diagonal. How many paylines contain three matching symbols?
A payline means one complete row or one of the two long diagonals. Count the paylines where all three symbols match.
Count the winning paylines. A winning payline is a full row or long diagonal with the same symbol in all three cells.
Use only the three rows and the two long diagonals as paylines. How many of those paylines show three matching symbols?
How many paylines win, where paylines are the full rows plus the two long diagonals and a win has three identical symbols?
paytable_score_value: Find the row or long diagonal where all three symbols match, then use the side paytable to read that symbol's score. What score is shown?
A payline is a full row or either long diagonal. Find the matching-symbol payline, then give its score from the side paytable.
Use only the three rows and two long diagonals as paylines. Which one has three matching symbols, and what score does that symbol have in the paytable?
Find the single winning payline: a full row or long diagonal with the same symbol in all three cells. Report that symbol's side-paytable score.
Look for the row or long diagonal with three identical symbols. Use the side paytable to give the score for that symbol.
reel_completion_label: A payline is any full row or either long diagonal. The first two reels are fixed. Which labeled option for the third reel completes a payline?
Use the three rows and the two long diagonals as paylines. Choose the third-reel option that makes three matching symbols on a payline.
Only rows and the two long diagonals count as paylines. Which option for the third reel creates one matching-symbol payline?
The left two reels stay as shown. Which labeled third-reel option gives a full row or long diagonal with three identical symbols?
Pick the third-reel option that completes a payline, where a payline is one row or either long diagonal with all three symbols matching.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a toy slot machine with three reels, three visible rows, and simple symbol icons
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Return JSON with exactly two keys: "annotation" and "answer".
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return JSON with exactly one key: "answer".
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_winning_payline_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of image-pixel segments, each using two endpoint points [x, y] in [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] form; include one segment along each winning row or diagonal payline; use [] if no payline wins
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_winning_payline_count: set "answer" to the integer count of winning paylines
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_paytable_score_value: set "annotation" to one image-pixel segment in [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] form along the winning row or diagonal payline that determines the score
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_paytable_score_value: set "answer" to the integer score read from the side paytable for the matching symbol on the winning payline
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_reel_completion_label: set "annotation" to the image-pixel bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the selected third-reel option
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_reel_completion_label: set "answer" to the selected option letter
